title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Upstox

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Upstox
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
